Tech Warmup II Research & Persona

**Features:** 

* Energizing, exciting music (rock n roll for some) in background for some, with satisfying, ASMR-like sound effects for spinning of slots, cashing in on prize (“cha-ching”), and super-boost power-ups (exclamatory congratulations sounds).   
* Visually, very flamboyant colors and combinations of colors, with lots of dark and light contrast (pitch black contrast with bright, neon golden yellow).   
* Provides a variety of options when selecting boost or power-up.   
* Before each spin, the user is given many choices of what they can do: (regular) spin, bonus buy (spend coins), blitz boost (power-up), change bet amount, turbo spin (special type of spin), autoplay, etc. 


**Jargon:**  

* **Active payline:** the winning payline currently active and in play, which results in a payout if it hits a winning combination. Slot machines featuring multiple paylines enable players to choose the number of active paylines they wish to play with on each spin.   
* **Cascading reels** (aka avalanche slots or tumbling reels): an exciting feature where symbols on a winning line disappear, consequently displaying replacement symbols that may create another winning line within the same spin. Slot games featuring cascading reels offer more than just one payline.   
* **Expanding wilds**: a special type of wild that covers the entire reel when it appears on the screen for bigger chances to win.  
* **High or low variance**: high variance slots pay out *less* *frequently* but whose *prizes* are usually *higher*. Low variance slots pay out *more* *frequently* but offer *lower* *payouts*.   
* **Return to Player (RTP)**: a percentage demonstrating how much the slot pays back. For instance, an RTP of 97% means a player would get $97 for every $100 wager.  
* **Source**: [https://www.translationroyale.com/the-translation-royale-glossary-of-slot-machine-terms/](https://www.translationroyale.com/the-translation-royale-glossary-of-slot-machine-terms/) 

**Visual themes:** 

* Very bright, flashy glowing colors (usually golden and bright/neon yellow, pink, blue)  
* Whole slot machine will move, pop out at you (user), or vibrate when something special occurs or a big win has been achieved.   
* Certain buttons are made to look bigger or more enticing in order to attract the user's attention and eyes to go for those (more risky or) button options. 


**Types of users:** 

* People who are bored and looking for fun, excitement, and/or entertainment.   
* People who may need or want some financial assistance or are under financial stress and hope to “win big.”   
* People who are loaded and have the facilities to support their desires and hobbies.   
* People who like video games (or gamification of non-game situations).   
* People who like the feeling of taking risks and gambling (compulsive gamblers).   
* **Source**: [https://www.smartico.ai/blog-post/psychology-slot-machine-gamification](https://www.smartico.ai/blog-post/psychology-slot-machine-gamification) 

**Persona** 

**Name**: Richard  
**Age**: 62   
**Details**:   
Richard is a Chinese businessman who has fulfilled his parents’ dreams they had tried to  manifest during the baby-naming process. He has funds to spare and time to pass (enjoyingly), so he often invites his fellow business-owning friends over to play card games, have just a few drinks, and gamble their weekly allowances away, which has in turn led him to now be obsessed with gambling in the form of slot machines.   
**Wants/Needs**:   
Richard wants to feel the adrenaline rush of putting his hard-earned assets at risk since he knows he has the facilities to fund his infatuation for slot machines. Richard needs a thrilling, pleasure-ful way to pass his free time as he recently leveled up to being his own boss and also a fun way to exercise his free will.   
**Doesn’t Want/Need**:   
Richard doesn’t have the need or goal of becoming a baker and making loads of bread, he just wants some amusement and his mindset is simple… whatever hits the bank will hit the bank. 

**User Stories**

1. As a successful business owner, I want to use my well-earned affluence to reward myself in fun ways, ways that get me my cardiovascular exercise of the day in while also keeping me entertained after I outgrew my once-fanatical passion for video games.   
2. As an outgoing person who loves to invite my friends over to have fun, I want to now also get the thrilling feeling of excitement in other ways that are easily accessible, which I can now get straight from my phone.
